title: Сampfire+
description: Datapack adds new crafting on the campfire. Now you can put cactus, sponge, chorus and more on the campfire.
body:
Data pack adds new crafting on the campfire. Now you can put cactus, sponge, chorus and more on the campfire.

Of course, there is not enough fire to melt metal, but you can burn a stone and drain a sponge.

Crafting on a campfire does not require fuel, but it takes more time.
